instruction: Парсер целых чисел из строки на C для самодельного компилятора. Без libc.
Динамический массив (vector) для компилятора. Без libc, только realloc через свой аллокатор.
Код загрузчика stage1 на NASM. Загружает stage2 с FAT32.
output:
```nasm
org 0x7C00
bits 16

jmp short start
nop
bpb_oem:            db "MSWIN4.1"
bpb_bytes_per_sec:  dw 512
bpb_sec_per_clust:  db 1
bpb_reserved_sec:   dw 32
bpb_fat_count:      db 2
bpb_root_entries:   dw 0
bpb_total_sec:      dw 0
bpb_media:          db 0xF8
bpb_sec_per_fat16:  dw 0
bpb_sec_per_track:  dw 0
bpb_heads:          dw 0
bpb_hidden_sec:     dd 0
bpb_total_sec_large: dd 0

; FAT32 extended
bpb_sec_per_fat32:  dd 0
bpb_ext_flags:      dw 0
bpb_fs_ver:         dw 0
bpb_root_cluster:   dd 2
bpb_fs_info:        dw 1
bpb_bk_boot_sec:    dw 6
bpb_reserved:       times 12 db 0
bpb_drive_num:      db 0x80
bpb_reserved1:      db 0
bpb_boot_sig:       db 0x29
bpb_vol_id:         dd 0
bpb_vol_label:      db "NO NAME    "
bpb_fs_type:        db "FAT32   "

start:
    xor ax, ax
    mov ds, ax
    mov es, ax
    mov ss, ax
    mov sp, 0x7C00
    mov [bpb_drive_num], dl

    ; Вычисляем начало кластеров
    mov eax, [bpb_hidden_sec]
    add eax, [bpb_reserved_sec]
    mov ebx, [bpb_sec_per_fat32]
    movzx ecx, byte [bpb_fat_count]
    imul ebx, ecx
    add eax, ebx
    mov [data_start], eax

    ; Читаем корневой каталог
    mov eax, [bpb_root_cluster]
    call read_cluster_chain
    
    ; Ищем STAGE2  BIN
    mov si, root_buf
.search:
    cmp byte [si], 0xE5
    je .next
    cmp byte [si], 0
    je .not_found
    push si
    mov cx, 11
    mov di, stage2_name
    repe cmpsb
    pop si
    je .found
.next:
    add si, 32
    cmp si, root_buf + 16384
    jb .search
    jmp .not_found

.found:
    mov ax, [si + 26]
    shl eax, 16
    mov ax, [si + 20]
    call read_cluster_chain
    jmp 0x1000:0x0000

.not_found:
    mov si, err_msg
    call print
    hlt

print:
    lodsb
    or al, al
    jz .done
    mov ah, 0x0E
    int 0x10
    jmp print
.done:
    ret

err_msg db "NO STAGE2", 0
stage2_name db "STAGE2  BIN"
data_start dd 0
root_buf equ 0x5000

times 510 - ($ - $$) db 0
dw 0xAA55
```

Транслятор с ассемблерного синтаксиса AT&T в Intel на Python. Для тулчейна.
output:
```python
import re

def att2intel(line):
    line = line.strip()
    if not line or line.startswith('#') or line.startswith('.'):
        return line
    
    # mov %eax, %ebx -> mov ebx, eax
    m = re.match(r'(\w+)\s+([^,]+),\s*(.+)', line)
    if m:
        op, src, dst = m.groups()
        src = src.strip()
        dst = dst.strip()
        
        # Убираем %
        src = re.sub(r'%(\w+)', r'\1', src)
        dst = re.sub(r'%(\w+)', r'\1', dst)
        
        # Меняем порядок
        return f"{op} {dst}, {src}"
    
    return line

def convert_file(in_path, out_path):
    with open(in_path) as f_in, open(out_path, 'w') as f_out:
        for line in f_in:
            f_out.write(att2intel(line) + '\n')
```

```c
typedef struct {
    uint64_t r15, r14, r13, r12, r11, r10, r9, r8;
    uint64_t rbp, rdi, rsi, rdx, rcx, rbx, rax;
    uint64_t rip, cs, rflags, rsp, ss;
} ctx_t;

typedef struct thread {
    ctx_t ctx;
    struct thread *next;
    int state;
    void *stack;
} thread_t;

thread_t *current = NULL;
thread_t *ready_queue = NULL;

// asm
void switch_context(ctx_t *old, ctx_t *new);
```
```nasm
global switch_context
switch_context:
    mov [rdi + 0], r15
    mov [rdi + 8], r14
    mov [rdi + 16], r13
    mov [rdi + 24], r12
    mov [rdi + 32], r11
    mov [rdi + 40], r10
    mov [rdi + 48], r9
    mov [rdi + 56], r8
    mov [rdi + 64], rbp
    mov [rdi + 72], rdi
    mov [rdi + 80], rsi
    mov [rdi + 88], rdx
    mov [rdi + 96], rcx
    mov [rdi + 104], rbx
    mov [rdi + 112], rax

    pop rax
    mov [rdi + 120], rax
    mov [rdi + 128], cs
    mov [rdi + 136], rsp
    mov [rdi + 144], ss
    push rax

    mov r15, [rsi + 0]
    mov r14, [rsi + 8]
    mov r13, [rsi + 16]
    mov r12, [rsi + 24]
    mov r11, [rsi + 32]
    mov r10, [rsi + 40]
    mov r9, [rsi + 48]
    mov r8, [rsi + 56]
    mov rbp, [rsi + 64]
    mov rdi, [rsi + 72]
    mov rbx, [rsi + 104]
    mov rax, [rsi + 112]

    mov rcx, [rsi + 136]
    mov rdx, [rsi + 144]
    mov ss, dx
    mov rsp, rcx

    push qword [rsi + 128]
    push qword [rsi + 120]

    mov rsi, [rsi + 80]
    mov rdx, [rsi + 88]
    mov rcx, [rsi + 96]

    iretq
```

ISR_NOERR 0

output:
```nasm
bits 32

global load_binary
load_binary:
    ; args: eax = адрес бинарника, ebx = размер
    push ebp
    mov ebp, esp
    
    mov esi, eax
    mov edi, 0x100000
    mov ecx, ebx
    rep movsb
    
    ; Настройка сегментов для 32-битного кода
    mov ax, 0x10
    mov ds, ax
    mov es, ax
    mov fs, ax
    mov gs, ax
    mov ss, ax
    mov esp, 0x90000
    
    call 0x100000
    
    pop ebp
    ret
```

Обработчик системных вызовов через syscall/sysret.
output:
```nasm
global syscall_entry
extern syscall_table

syscall_entry:
    swapgs
    mov [gs:8], rsp
    mov rsp, [gs:16]
    
    push rcx
    push r11
    
    cmp rax, 256
    jae .bad_syscall
    
    push rdi
    push rsi
    push rdx
    push r10
    push r8
    push r9
    
    call [syscall_table + rax * 8]
    
    add rsp, 48
    
    pop r11
    pop rcx
    
    mov rsp, [gs:8]
    swapgs
    o64 sysret
    
.bad_syscall:
    mov rax, -1
    jmp .done
```
```c
void syscall_init(void) {
    uint64_t star = (uint64_t)(0x08UL << 32) | (uint64_t)(0x1BUL << 48);
    uint64_t lstar = (uint64_t)syscall_entry;
    uint64_t sfmask = 0;
    
    wrmsr(0xC0000081, star);
    wrmsr(0xC0000082, lstar);
    wrmsr(0xC0000084, sfmask);
}
```

void idt_set_double_fault(void) {
    static uint8_t stack[4096] __attribute__((aligned(16)));
    
    tss.ist1 = (uint64_t)stack + sizeof(stack);
    idt_set_entry(8, double_fault_handler, 0x8E, 1);
}
```

    push rax
    push rcx

    push rbx

    push rdi
    push r8
    push r9
    push r10
    push r11
    push r12
    push r13
    push r14

    pop r14
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop r11
    pop r10

    pop rsi

    pop rbx
    pop rdx
    pop rcx
    pop rax
    
    iretq
```
```c
void nmi_callback(void) {
    kprintf("NMI received!\n");
    
    uint64_t mca_status = rdmsr(0x401);
    if (mca_status & (1ULL << 63)) {
        kprintf("Machine Check Exception detected!\n");
        kprintf("MCi_STATUS: 0x%lx\n", mca_status);
    }
}
```

```c
typedef void (*irq_handler_t)(void);

static irq_handler_t irq_handlers[16];

void irq_register(int irq, irq_handler_t handler) {
    irq_handlers[irq] = handler;
}

void irq_handler(int irq, void *regs) {
    if (irq >= 40) outb(0xA0, 0x20);
    outb(0x20, 0x20);
    
    if (irq_handlers[irq - 32]) {
        irq_handlers[irq - 32]();
    }
}
```

.global parse_int_arm64
parse_int_arm64:
    mov x2, #0
    mov x3, #1
    mov x4, #10
1:
    ldrb w5, [x0], #1
    cbz w5, 4f
    cmp w5, #' '
    beq 1b
    cmp w5, #'-'
    bne 2f
    mov x3, #-1
    b 1b
2:
    cmp w5, #'0'
    blo 5f
    cmp w5, #'9'
    bhi 5f
    sub w5, w5, #'0'
    mul x2, x2, x4
    add x2, x2, x5
    b 1b
4:
    mul x0, x2, x3
    str x0, [x1]
    mov x0, #0
    ret
5:
    mov x0, #-1
    ret

instruction: parse_int RISC-V RV64I assembly
output:
.global parse_int_riscv
parse_int_riscv:
    li t0, 0
    li t1, 1
    li t2, 10
1:
    lbu t3, 0(a0)
    addi a0, a0, 1
    beqz t3, 4f
    li t4, ' '
    beq t3, t4, 1b
    li t4, '-'
    bne t3, t4, 2f
    li t1, -1
    j 1b
2:
    li t4, '0'
    blt t3, t4, 5f
    li t4, '9'
    bgt t3, t4, 5f
    sub t3, t3, t4
    mul t0, t0, t2
    add t0, t0, t3
    j 1b
4:
    mul a0, t0, t1
    sd a0, 0(a1)
    li a0, 0
    ret
5:
    li a0, -1
    ret
